2118100.name: OKUBI
2118100.description:
DIVE INTO INTENSE, HIGH-VELOCITY COMBAT

Step into adrenaline-filled arenas and wide, chaotic battlegrounds where every second matters and every choice can change everything. OKUBI’s combat mixes smooth aerial movement with sharp ground attacks, letting you chain combos, dodge fire, and pull off clutch plays that feel incredibly satisfying. From last-second escapes to big, gravity-defying finishes, this is competitive action reimagined — fast, fluid, and unlike anything you’ve played before.

REINVENTING THE WAY YOU FIGHT

OKUBI introduces a revolutionary wings-based PvP combat system that shatters genre expectations. Master insane vertical mobility, slip into dynamic mid-air maneuvers, and dive into hard-hitting ground engagements that demand both mechanical skill and tactical finesse. Soar above enemies, strike from impossible angles, then slam back down to the arena with devastating precision. It’s easy to pick up — but only the truly dedicated will ever touch the ceiling of mastery.

EXPLORE A DYNAMIC WORLD

From intimate 1v1 duels to coordinated 2v2 and high-intensity 3v3 battles, every match is a test of adaptability. Venture into large-scale extraction zones where players clash over rare loot, moving caravans, and high-risk objectives. But you’re never fighting just the players — you’re fighting the world itself.
Unpredictable Yōkai disturbances tear through the map, warping the battlefield with dynamic events that force immediate adaptation. A safe route becomes hostile. An ambush turns into an opportunity. The terrain itself becomes an enemy — or your greatest ally.

FORGE YOUR LEGEND

Across the galaxy lies a wealth of rare minerals, volatile energy sources, ancient blueprints, and exotic tech ripe for the taking. Trade, barter, or extract them through danger — then use your haul to craft powerful gear, refine your weapons, optimize your loadouts, and carve out your identity in the galaxy’s most competitive arenas.
In OKUBI, your build is your story, and each crafted piece pushes you one step closer to domination.

IMMERSIVE SOCIAL HUBS THAT EVOLVE WITH YOU

Explore lively hubs filled with players, activity, and constant movement. These social zones offers traders, crafting stations, unique mini-games, and different community events each cycle. Team up for PvP or open-world hunts, craft powerful gear, refine your builds, or simply hang out and meet new players between matches. Each hub feels like a thriving outpost in a living galaxy — a place where stories begin, squads are formed, and the OKUBI community comes to life.

QUESTS, MISSIONS & PLAYER-DRIVEN DISCOVERY

Take on quests that send you across star systems, into dangerous territories, and through evolving conflicts shaped by the world’s lore and the players within it. Missions introduce new mechanics, rare enemies, and unique rewards, all woven into a universe that feels vast, alive, and full of secrets waiting to be uncovered.

ELEMENTAL SKILL TREE

The game’s deep skill tree lets you channel the Five Elements, each representing a distinct combat philosophy. Infuse your weapons with elemental power, unleash specialized abilities, and shape a refined fighting style that reflects your mastery.
Whether you overwhelm enemies with raw force, control space with tactical abilities, or strike with precise elemental triggers, every fight becomes a high-skill, high-strategy mind game.

CHARACTER CUSTOMIZATION THAT MATTERS

Build your character your way. Upgrade stats, enhance gear, unlock elemental modifiers, and equip dynamic trigger buffs that amplify your abilities when conditions are met. Every choice impacts your flow, your combos, and your dominance in combat — giving you endless room to express your creativity and outplay your opponents.

JOIN THE OKUBI COMMUNITY

OKUBI is being crafted by a passionate solo developer — an entire universe built with heart, dedication, and the support of its players. Join our Discord community where development is transparent, collaborative, and alive.
Playtest early builds, offer direct feedback, vote on new ideas, and help shape the systems that define the future of the game.

This isn’t just a community — it’s the forge where OKUBI is born.
The journey is just beginning. Jump in and become part of what comes next.

英语*
